_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 heterozygosity fosters de novo tumorigenesis but impairs malignant transformation.

_contextSnippet: As opposed to pNF, MPNST often present the loss of a Schwann cell differentiation marker such as S100
details: Successfully identified Schwann cells in pNF and showed loss of S100 expression in MPNST, confirming malignant transformation
